title: taraxacum tenuissimum
intro: Taraxacum tenuissimum, also known as slender dandelion or Asian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, with its health benefits attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and flavonoids. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum tenuissimum is often used as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to support liver and kidney function.
